title: alyssum granatense var. luteolum
intro: Alyssum granatense var. luteolum, commonly known as the yellow lesser meadow rue, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of alyssum granatense var. luteolum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the relaxation of the nervous system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
